description:
A multi-platform launcher for your anime games

Twintaillauncher is a multi-platform launcher that brings mod support, quality-of-life improvements, and advanced features to a variety of anime-styled games.
Changelog
Games
- Honkai: StarRail now again works with all protons and by all we mean all
- Honkai: StarRail no longer crashes on cutscenes on flatpak
- WutheringWaves should have no more cases where for some people skips cutscenes
Modding
- XXMI for WutheringWaves now behaves fully as expected no weird textures etc...
Bug fixes & Improvements
- Application now has support for making translation locales, default is English
- New and improved Update available notification popup
- Bazzite and Fedora atomic like distros /var/home pathing should be fixed yet again
- Various bug fixes we did not keep track off
What's Changed
- Add german and nekonian translation by @MrLGamer in #252
- Release 2.2.0 by @TukanDev in #253
New Contributors
- @MrLGamer made their first contribution in #252
Full Changelog: ttl-v2.1.1...ttl-v2.2.0
